codeReview.summary: The scaffold commit satisfies the requested monorepo structure, package manifests/configs, and clean install/typecheck/test expectations; I did not find any high-confidence correctness defects in the reviewed changes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill's mandatory TDD step does not fit scaffold-only features that explicitly require valid Vitest setup with zero tests, so correct work still shows up as a procedural deviation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: backend-worker/SKILL.md step 2 says 'Create test files BEFORE implementation'; the handoff for monorepo-scaffold records skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false because features.json explicitly expected 'pnpm -r test --run succeeds (no tests yet, but vitest config valid)'.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Repository setup depends on running .factory/init.sh to create .env and the local Postgres proxy, but .factory/services.yaml does not expose an init/setup command, so workers must discover and invoke it ad hoc.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The transcript skeleton for worker session 3ae24e89-431c-4509-820d-c140f2265925 shows Read and Execute calls for /Users/chris/workspace/Involute/.factory/init.sh; .factory/services.yaml only documents install/build/typecheck/test/lint and postgres/postgres_proxy/api/web services.

summary: PASS: reviewed monorepo-scaffold at ac737aded8fc10e23b610cfa3e2855570801b3fb. The workspace scaffold matches the feature requirements and I found no high-confidence code defects; I noted skill and setup-documentation gaps for scrutiny triage.
